title: SovietJokes
description: A lightweight Spigot plugin that automatically broadcasts a random Soviet joke to all players every 10 minutes, bringing Cold War humor to your server.
body:
# SovietJokes 蘇聯笑話推播器

**經典蘇聯政治笑話自動推播**  
每 **10 分鐘** 自動發送一則諷刺辛辣的蘇聯時代笑話，讓你重溫那段荒謔的歷史。

**手動獲取笑話**  
使用指令：`/jokes`  
隨時想聽一則，就打這個指令。

> 範例笑話（經典雷根版）：  
> 一位美國人對蘇聯人說：「在美國，我們有言論自由，我可以站在白宮前大喊『羅納德·雷根，下地獄吧！』而不會有事。」  
> 蘇聯人回：「這有什麼，我們也可以站在紅場上大喊『羅納德·雷根，下地獄吧！』而不會有事。」

歡迎加入，一起體會蘇聯式幽默。

---

# SovietJokes – Soviet Joke Broadcaster

**Classic Soviet political jokes on autopilot**  
A sharp, satirical Soviet-era joke is automatically posted every **10 minutes**, bringing you back to that absurd chapter of history.

**Get a joke manually**  
Use the command: `/jokes`  
Whenever you’re in the mood, just type it.

> Example Joke (Classic Reagan Version):  
> An American says to a Soviet citizen: “In America we have freedom of speech—I can stand in front of the White House and shout ‘Ronald Reagan, go to hell!’ and nothing will happen to me.”  
> The Soviet replies: “So what? We can do the same. I can stand in Red Square and shout ‘Ronald Reagan, go to hell!’ and nothing will happen to me either.”

Welcome aboard—come experience Soviet-style humor.
